name: Layered Mediterranean Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 cans black beans, rinsed and drained (15.5 oz each)
1 package tomato-basil feta cheese, crumbled (4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the beans in a shallow 9-inch dish.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the chopped tomato and the remaining ingredients (cucumber, olives, green onions, olive oil, and Greek seasoning). Gently toss to mix.
3. Pour the mixture over the beans.
4. Sprinkle the crumbled feta cheese on top.
5. Cover and chill thoroughly.
